arts.ttl: Ayden Heaven Man Utd transfer proves Arsenal must change after Chido Obi-Martin example - Sam Truelove
arts.sum: With Heaven looking likely to leave the club in the coming days, just like fellow Arsenal academy prospects Obi-Martin, Cozier-Duberry and Walters have done in recent months, it highlights a clear problem in north London right now. Heaven and Obi-Martin are not the only Hale Enders to leave Arsenal in recent years due to a lack of pathway to the first team.

arts.ttl: Arsenal make shock bid for Ollie Watkins: Aston Villa reject offer for star striker as Mikel Arteta looks to bolster his attacking force before the transfer window slams shut
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: It is understood Arsenal have made an initial offer for Aston Villa forward Watkins which has been rejected but an improved attempt is expected.

arts.ttl: Arsenal told Victor Osimhen has TWO release clauses
arts.sum: However, any transfer deal for Osimhen - who is on loan at Galatasaray from Napoli - will be extremely expensive in January. Osimhen joined Galatasaray last summer on loan for the season from Napoli until June 2025.

arts.ttl: Arsenal tipped to sign Brazil’s BEST No.9
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have already been rejected by Igor Jesus, but South American football expert Tim Vickery has tipped Arsenal to be more successful in their pursuit of the 23-year-old if they make a move. Arsenal have been tipped to make a move for Botafogo striker Igor Jesus before the transfer window concludes.
